info.name: Artisan
info.description: Artisan background from the Player’s Handbook 2024.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

li.i: Choose one kind of Artisan's Tools

ul.li: Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Artisan’s Tools (same as above), 2 Pouches, Traveler's Clothes, 32 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: You began mopping floors and scrubbing counters in an artisan's workshop for a few coppers per day as soon as you were strong enough to carry a bucket. When you were old enough to apprentice, you learned to create basic crafts of your own, as well as how to sweet-talk the occasional demanding customer. Your trade has also given you a keen eye for detail.

setters.set: Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, Crafter Feat, Investigation and Persuasion Skills, an Artisan's Tool

description.p: This pack contains items that are given to a character of Artisan Background, if you chose option A for Equipment.
You will receive following items by extracting contents of this pack:
Note: This pack doesn't include the Artisan’s Tools of the same kind as Proficiency gained from this Background (can be taken from "Tools" Equipment category) and 32 GP.
